name: Dr. Ainojie 'Alex' Irune
role: Executive Director, Oando PLC; Managing Director, Oando Energy Resources Nigeria Ltd
context: Controls all upstream gas assets at Oando. PhD in Computer Science — will immediately understand NRG Bloom's data center model. Previously CEO of Oando Clean Energy. The single most important executive to engage for this partnership.
background: PhD Computer Science + BSc Computer Science, University of Nottingham. Early career: designed in-vehicle systems for Honda, Nissan, Jaguar Land Rover; IT consultant at Dimax Technology. At Oando since 2011: Head of Corporate Comms, Chief Strategy Officer, COO of OER, CEO of Oando Clean Energy, now MD of OERNL.
notes: NOT on the initial email. Need to reach him through Chioma or Ololade, or find a warm introduction path (energy conferences, mutual contacts). He is the decision-influential — Wale Tinubu (GCEO) is final approver.
